description:
With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2014 Porsche GT3, 3.8 F6, RWD, 475bhp, 7 Speed PDK Automatic. AED 399,000 AED 
 - Mileage only 56,442 KM's - Full Porsche Service History - Porsche Warranty Valid Until 14th December 2026 (Extendable) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Sound Package Plus - LED Headlights incl. Porsche Dynamic Light System Plus (PDLS Plus) - Sport Chrono Package - Leather Interior Package with Decorative Red Stitching - Automatically Dimming Mirrors with Integrated Rain Sensor - Porsche Communication Management (PCM) incl. Navigation Module - Seat Belts in Red - Porsche Torque Vectoring Plus (PTV Plus) - 20" GT3 Wheels - Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) - Sport Design Side Mirrors - 2-zone automatic air conditioning - Roof lining in Alcantara® - Bluetooth® Hands-Free Mobile Phone Interface - Sport Design Steering Wheel in Alcantara® - Center Console Trim in Brushed Aluminum
